name: Perseverance + Ingenuity
fact: Designed to cache promising rock cores for a future Mars Sample Return mission. Already drilled and sealed 26+ samples by mid-2024. The Ingenuity helicopter — originally a 30-day technology demo — flew 88 times before damaging a rotor in January 2024. First powered, controlled flight on another world.
capability: First Mars sample-caching for future return; first powered flight in another atmosphere (Ingenuity).
